Get Started
★★★★★Trusted by Leading Secured Loan Brokers

Get Qualified Secured Loan Leads Delivered To Your CRM

We'll generate qualified secured loan leads from your perfect fit prospects with proven systems. All delivered directly to your CRM.

Six Reasons To Choose Sendlead

Exclusive, AI-qualified prospects delivered instantly to your CRM.

100% Exclusive to You

Every prospect comes to you and only you. No more racing 5 other companies to make first contact. You're the only business they hear from.

AI-Powered Qualification

Our systematic qualification process checks 15+ data points before any lead reaches you. Only serious buyers with verified budgets get through.

Instant CRM Delivery

Prospects appear in your system within seconds of qualification. Call while they're still highly engaged and ready to buy.

Pre-Warmed Prospects

We don't stop at generating leads. Every prospect receives a multi-touch bespoke nuture flow that's been proven to double lead conversion rates.

Transparent Pricing

£100 per lead, 50 leads minimum trial period. No long-term contracts, scale up and down as you need. Simple and straightforward.

Proven Results

Our partners see 67% average improvement in conversion rates and 85% connect rates within 24 hours.

Our Secured Loan Lead Results

Here's what our secured loan brokers actually achieve

Independent Secured Loan Broker

£850K Funded In 90 Days

Generated £850k in secured loan approvals in 90 days using our lead system. Went from purely referral-based to systematic, predictable lead generation that scales.

Multi-Lender Secured Finance Firm

140 Qualified Leads Monthly

Closed £2.8M in secured loans within 6 months from 140 qualified leads we delivered. No competition for leads, no shared prospects, just exclusive opportunities.

Property Secured Loan Specialist

298% Revenue Increase

Scaled from £42k to £167k monthly revenue in 4 months by targeting property owners needing secured finance. Our targeting found the right prospects immediately.

Asset Secured Loan Broker

187% Revenue Increase

Increased monthly revenue from £38k to £109k in 4 months working exclusively with qualified asset owners we delivered. No cold calling required.

How We Generate Your Secured Loan Leads

Our proven 5-step process for delivering qualified secured loan leads

Strategy & Qualification Setup

We capture your exact target client profile, security requirements, and delivery preferences. No generic leads - everything is tailored to your specific secured loan requirements.

Build Targeting Infrastructure

We create precision-targeted campaigns using proven secured loan lead generation systems. Our AI qualification process ensures only serious prospects reach you.

Real-Time Lead Delivery

Qualified leads sync instantly to your CRM with complete contact details and qualification data. No delays, no aged leads, no manual data entry required.

Automated Follow-Up Systems

Leads receive immediate confirmation they'll hear from you, plus ongoing nurture sequences that keep them engaged until they're ready to proceed with their loan application.

Performance Tracking & Optimisation

Weekly reporting on lead quality, conversion rates, and campaign performance. We continuously optimise to improve your results over time.

What Our Secured Loan Partners Say

Real feedback from secured loan brokers who've transformed their businesses

"Sendlead transformed our secured loan business completely. We were stuck competing for scraps from the big lead companies, now we get exclusive prospects who actually want to speak with us. Revenue doubled in four months."

Rachel Green

Managing Director, Green Secured Finance

"Finally found a lead company that understands secured loan brokers. No more chasing dead leads or fighting five other brokers for the same client. The qualification process actually works."

Kevin Johnson

Founder, Johnson Lending Solutions

"Been in secured loans for 15 years and tried every lead source going. Sendlead is the only one that consistently delivers quality prospects. Our conversion rate went from 12% to 28%."

Sophie Williams

Senior Partner, Williams & Co. Finance
